notes: All tests designed for automated execution. Includes expected_output, assertions, and tags for filtering.

test_suites.description: Tests that simple greetings and conversational prompts do NOT trigger the tool pipeline and respond in under 1 second.
Tests that single-intent prompts route correctly to simple_workflow and execute a single tool.

tests.title: Sentiment single tool routing
tests.input: Analyze the sentiment of: I love sunny days!

tests.title: Summarizer single tool routing
tests.input: Summarize this: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. It was a sunny day and the fox was happy.

tests.title: Knowledge retrieval single tool routing
tests.input: Search documents for information about machine learning

tests.title: Weather city with spaces
tests.input: What's the weather in New York?

tests.title: Weather international city
tests.input: Tell me the weather in Tokyo

test_suites.suite_name: Path C — Complex Multi-Step Agentic Flow
test_suites.description: Tests the full 5-agent pipeline for complex multi-tool prompts.

tests.title: 3-step chain: Scrape + Summarize + Sentiment
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize the content, and then analyze the sentiment of the summary.

tests.title: 4-step chain triggers HITL approval
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize the content, analyze its sentiment, and then give me the statistics of the word counts.

tests.title: 5-step chain triggers HITL
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize it, analyze sentiment, run a data analysis on word frequencies, and store a JSON of the results.

tests.title: HITL auto-approve after 30s
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize, analyze sentiment, and then analyze the data.

tests.title: HITL user manually approves
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize, check sentiment, and analyze the numbers.

tests.title: HITL user rejects plan
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize, analyze sentiment, extract JSON.

tests.title: 2-step chain: Scrape + Summarize
tests.input: Get the content from https://example.com and then summarize it for me.

tests.title: 2-step chain: Calculate + Summarize
tests.input: Calculate 120 * 35 and then give me a brief summary of what the calculation represents.

tests.title: Intent Interpreter agent active during complex task
tests.input: Scrape a page, summarize it, and analyze sentiment.

tests.title: Router agent active during complex task
tests.input: Scrape a page, summarize it, and analyze sentiment.

tests.title: Planner agent active during complex task
tests.input: Scrape a page, summarize it, and analyze sentiment.

tests.title: Executor agent active during complex task
tests.input: Scrape a page, summarize it, and analyze sentiment.

tests.title: Results Summarizer agent active during complex task
tests.input: Scrape a page, summarize it, and analyze sentiment.

tests.title: Live timer visible during execution
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize, then analyze sentiment.

test_suites.description: Comprehensive tests for the calculator tool including sanitization, edge cases, and operator support.

tests.title: Non-math gibberish input routed to calculator

test_suites.description: Tests for the Python code executor tool including safe execution, output capture, and edge cases.

tests.title: List comprehension
tests.input: Execute Python: [x**2 for x in range(5)]

tests.title: Multi-line code execution
tests.input:
Run code:
x = 10
y = 20
print(x + y)

tests.title: Large output code
tests.input: Run code: for i in range(1000): print(i)

tests.title: Exception handling in code
tests.input:
Run code: try:
  x = 1/0
except ZeroDivisionError:
  print('caught')

tests.title: Code with no print statement (expression result)

test_suites.description: Tests for the mocked weather API tool, including city parsing, missing params, and error handling.

tests.title: Valid multi-word city
tests.input: What is the weather in New York?

tests.title: Weather with typo in city
tests.input: What is the weather in Mumbaii?

test_suites.description: Tests for the web scraper tool including valid URLs, invalid URLs, timeouts, and redirect handling.

tests.title: URL that returns 500
tests.input: Scrape a page that returns 500 server error

tests.title: Extracted content passed to next tool in chain

test_suites.description: Tests for the text summarizer tool across various input types and lengths.

tests.title: Normal paragraph summarization
tests.input: Summarize: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. It was a beautiful day and the fox was very happy to be outside running around in the sunshine.

tests.title: Instructional text: bullet points
tests.input: Summarize this into bullet points: The Agentic Workflow Engine uses a 5-agent pipeline to handle complex tasks. It supports 9 specialized tools. It includes a human-in-the-loop approval for plans with 4+ steps.

tests.title: Technical text summarization
tests.input: Summarize: RESTful APIs use HTTP methods like GET, POST, PUT, DELETE to interact with resources. They follow stateless communication principles and use JSON or XML for data exchange.

tests.title: Text in non-English language
tests.input: Summarize: Le renard brun rapide saute par-dessus le chien paresseux. C'était une belle journée.

tests.title: Text with emoji
tests.input: Summarize: I love ❤️ coding 💻 and AI 🤖!

tests.title: Summary output used in next tool (chaining)
tests.input: Summarize this text and then analyze its sentiment: I love this amazing product!

tests.title: News article-style text
tests.input: Summarize: Scientists today announced a major breakthrough in quantum computing. The new algorithm reduces computation time by 10x compared to previous methods. This could revolutionize drug discovery and cryptography.

tests.title: Repeated text summarization
tests.input: Summarize: Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello Hello

test_suites.description: Tests for the sentiment analyzer across various emotional tones, languages, and edge cases.

tests.title: Clearly positive text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: I absolutely love this product! It's amazing!

tests.title: Clearly negative text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: This is the worst experience I've ever had. Terrible!

tests.title: Neutral text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: The meeting is scheduled for Tuesday at 3pm.

tests.title: Mixed sentiment text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: The product quality is great but the delivery was very slow and frustrating.

tests.title: Sarcastic text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: Oh great, another meeting that could have been an email. Just what I needed!

tests.title: Emoji-heavy text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: This is so 🔥🔥🔥! Love it 😍❤️✨

tests.title: All caps angry text
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: THIS IS ABSOLUTELY TERRIBLE. I HATE IT. NEVER AGAIN.

tests.title: Professional/corporate jargon
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: We are pleased to announce our Q3 results which exceeded analyst expectations by 15%.

tests.title: Multiple languages mixed
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: I love this! C'est magnifique! Das ist toll!

tests.title: Sentiment confidence score returned
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: I am extremely happy today!

tests.title: Technical/code text sentiment
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: def foo(): return None

tests.title: Question as sentiment input
tests.input: Analyze sentiment: Is this product worth buying?

tests.title: Query with no matching document

Query returns top-N results

tests.title: Source document referenced in response

test_suites.suite_name: Fallback & Edge Cases — No Tools Match
test_suites.description: Tests that unrecognized or weird prompts fall back gracefully to a conversational LLM response.

tests.title: Prompt that matches no tools
tests.input: What is the meaning of life?

tests.title: Prompt asking for something outside tool scope
tests.input: Book me a flight to Paris

tests.title: Pure math prompt not via calculator phrasing
tests.input: If a train leaves at 9am going 60mph...

tests.title: Extremely long prompt
tests.input: [10,000 character prompt with no clear tool intent]

tests.title: Prompt in non-English language
tests.input: Quelle est la capitale de la France?

tests.title: Repeated same prompt twice
tests.input: What is AI? (sent twice in a row)

tests.title: Unicode heavy input
tests.input: 分析这段文字的情感：我非常喜欢这个产品！

test_suites.description: Frontend UI tests for empty state, onboarding, agent visualization, and other UI requirements.

tests.title: Dashboard empty state shows example cards
Each tool has an example card on dashboard
Agent pipeline sidebar visible during execution
Elapsed live timer is visible during execution
HITL approval prompt UI displayed for 4+ step plan
Final report formatted nicely in UI

test_suites.description: Dedicated tests for the HITL approval flow for 4+ step plans.

tests.title: Auto-approve does NOT fire before 30 seconds
HITL countdown timer visible to user
HITL shows the generated plan to user
After rejection, user can submit new prompt

test_suites.description: Direct API endpoint tests for the FastAPI backend.

tests.title: POST /chat with empty body returns error
Invalid session ID for approve endpoint

test_suites.description: Tests that verify perfect context passing between tools in multi-step chains.

tests.title: Scrape → Summarize: output of scrape is input of summarize
Scrape → Summarize → Sentiment: full 3-tool chain
tests.input: Scrape https://example.com, summarize the content, then analyze the sentiment

tests.title: Calculate → Summarize: math result passed to summarizer
tests.input: Calculate 15 * 15 and then write a summary of what this calculation means

tests.title: Data Analyze → Summarize: stats passed to summarizer
tests.input: Analyze data: 10, 20, 30 and then summarize the findings

tests.title: Weather → Summarize: weather data passed to summarizer
tests.input: Get the weather in Mumbai and summarize it

tests.title: No context bleed between separate conversations
Final Results Summarizer produces natural language
Plan order matches user-specified order
tests.input: First calculate 2+2, then analyze sentiment of 'great result', then summarize both findings

test_suites.description: Tests for response times, timeout handling, and system stability under load.

tests.title: Infinite loop in code executor times out
System recovers after a tool timeout
